description: Item cost table for Oracle Cost Management. Each record represents the cost of an inventory item for a specific organization and cost type and stores the material, resource, overhead, and rolled-up cost components used in valuation, inventory accounting, and cost analysis.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the item cost record. Used together with organization context to relate item setup, translated descriptions, costs, and transaction history.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory organization or operating organization that owns the record.

columns.name: COST_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the cost type that defines how item cost is valued or analyzed.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ASSET_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether inventory asset applies to the record.

columns.name: LOT_SIZE
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: BASED_ON_ROLLUP_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether based on rollup applies to the record.

columns.name: SHRINKAGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value shrinkage for the transaction.

columns.name: DEFAULTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether defaulted applies to the record.

columns.name: COST_UPDATE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related cost update record.

columns.name: PL_MATERIAL
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PL_MATERIAL_OVERHEAD
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PL_RESOURCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PL_OUTSIDE_PROCESSING
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PL_OVERHEAD
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TL_MATERIAL
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TL_MATERIAL_OVERHEAD
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TL_RESOURCE
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TL_OUTSIDE_PROCESSING
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TL_OVERHEAD
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: MATERIAL_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: MATERIAL_OVERHEAD_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: RESOURCE_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: OUTSIDE_PROCESSING_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: OVERHEAD_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: PL_ITEM_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: TL_ITEM_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: ITEM_COST
columns.description: Total item cost for the organization and cost type after combining all cost components.

columns.name: UNBURDENED_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: BURDEN_COST
columns.description: Business attribute of the item cost record used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: ROLLUP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related rollup record.

columns.name: ASSIGNMENT_SET_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related assignment set record.

business_questions: Show item cost by organization and cost type.
Compare material, resource, and overhead cost components.
Find item costs used for inventory valuation.
Show cost records updated by a cost rollup or cost update.
Identify items with zero or missing item cost.
Display standard or average cost details for an item.
Find item costs for a specific inventory organization.
Analyze cost changes across items and cost types.
